payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory deletion or durable memory write will be performed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command by a normal user and should not be routed to memory storage or executed.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Use authorized admin tooling with proper privileges if database maintenance is required.
If you intended to manage your own memories, use supported non-admin memory commands.
